title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma-4 12B, a local multimodal model supporting text, vision, and audio for agentic workflows. It runs on consumer laptops with 16GB VRAM and integrates with LiteRT-LM, Ollama, AI Edge Gallery, and other local inference tools.
